title: MV Ulysses
summary:
A number of motor vessels have been named Ulysses:

Ulysses (1870), which was wrecked in 1887, Gulf of Suez
MV Ulysses (1941), the former Empire Creek, which was wrecked in 1979
MV Ulysses (2000), a RO-RO ferry used by Irish Ferries since 2001
MV Ulysses (2006), a container ship, IMO 9364203
text:
A number of motor vessels have been named Ulysses:

Ulysses (1870), which was wrecked in 1887, Gulf of Suez
MV Ulysses (1941), the former Empire Creek, which was wrecked in 1979
MV Ulysses (2000), a RO-RO ferry used by Irish Ferries since 2001
MV Ulysses (2006), a container ship, IMO 9364203
